title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: COASTAL HEALTHCARE NEWPORT GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary care services, including treatment for acute and chronic illnesses, annual exams, sports physicals, health screenings, mental health evaluations, substance use disorder referrals, immunizations such as the yearly flu vaccine, and health education. 36 SW Nye Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday 7am-6pm, Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm (541) 265-4947 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 265-4947 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: County Bus transportation available Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Dental Care Expense Assistance Dental Screening Flu Vaccines General Medical Care Hearing Screening Low Vision Aids Mental Health Evaluation Nutrition Education Sports Participation Physical Examinations Substance Use Disorder Referrals Vaccine Information Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COASTAL HEALTHCARE NEWPORT
